allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('tunnel' in d, 'manualPublicUrl' in d\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/state.json'\); console.log\('tunnel:', JSON.stringify\(d.tunnel\)\); console.log\('manualPublicUrl:', d.manualPublicUrl\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('tunnel:', JSON.stringify\(j.tunnel\)\); console.log\('manualPublicUrl:', j.manualPublicUrl\);}\)")
